title: Cinematic and Web Funnel Engine — asset-ledger.json (Skill 62, U11)
description: P7-STILLS's artifact (CWFE-MANIFEST.json: 'asset-ledger.json (approved scene images)'). One entry per generated still image: a scene's own approval-tracked anchor still (whose hash is mirrored into journey/scene-plan.json's scenes[].anchor_asset_hash, spec 9.3) plus its first_frame_still/last_frame_still boundary pins (spec 9.2's camera start_state/end_state — the seed images a later unit's video generation pins its OWN clip's first-and-last-frame control to; NOT the connector boundary frames of spec 12.2, which ADR-9 requires be REAL ENCODED video frames extracted after encoding, never a generated still). Validated on every read/write by scripts/state_engine.py.

asset_id.description: Deterministic: '{scene_id}:{purpose}' — a producer re-run never creates a second entry for the same (scene, purpose) pair.
